home.tagline: Interactive games platform for bars and home parties

auth.signupTagline: Tutti — launch your first blind test in 1 minute
auth.termsYouTubeSuffix: By using Tutti, I also accept the
auth.confirmEmailNotice: Confirm your email to activate the account, then sign in.
auth.pendingBody: Your account is in the approval queue. An administrator will validate it shortly. If you have an invitation code, enter it below to activate your account immediately.
auth.rejectedBody: Your account has been rejected by the Tutti team. To learn the reason or appeal, contact us.
auth.invitedTitle: You were invited to join a team
auth.invitedHint: Referral code: {{code}}. You'll join the existing workspace as HOST.
auth.forgotPasswordTagline: We'll send you a magic link to reset your password.
auth.forgotPasswordSentHint: Check your inbox (and spam). The link is valid for 1h.
auth.resetPasswordTagline: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetSessionMissing: The recovery link has expired or is invalid.

library.title: Official library
library.subtitle: Playlists and quizzes curated by the Tutti team.
library.reimportConfirm: Reimport the entire library? Spotify + YouTube will be re-searched for non-cached tracks.
library.empty: No playlists found. Adjust filters or drop a JSON file in data/official-library/playlists/.
library.resyncHint: Re-imports the matching JSON file (Spotify + YouTube re-searched for non-cached).
library.resyncConfirm: Resync this playlist from its JSON source? DB tracks will be replaced.
library.aliasArtistHint: Pronunciation variants accepted by voice recognition (e.g. "the Beatles", "Beatles").

dashboard.tracksDescription: Listen, guess, score. With Spotify or our demo catalogue.
dashboard.quizzDescription: MCQ, true/false, free text, estimations. Bilingual FR/EN.
dashboard.noticeSessionEnded: Game ended. The final podium is showing on the TV screen for 5 minutes.
dashboard.noticeSessionCancelled: Session cancelled. You can create a new one anytime.
dashboard.noAccessHint: No game mode is enabled on your account. Contact support.

tracks.title: Tutti Tracks
tracks.searchHelp: Search by artist or title. Results come from the active music source.

playlists.poolSessionHint: Pool of {{pool}} tracks — {{n}} picked randomly per session (no duplicates).
playlists.emptyState: No playlists yet. Create your first one!
playlists.deleteConfirm: Delete this playlist? This action is permanent.
playlists.shareIntro: Generate a short code to send to another host. They can clone this playlist into their workspace.
playlists.shareInstructions: The other host must go to /admin/import-playlist and enter this code.
playlists.detailsEmpty: Select a track in the list to view its details and aliases.
playlists.aliasArtistHint: Variants accepted by voice recognition (synonyms, no accents, abbreviations…).
playlists.aliasTitleHint: Same rules: shorter versions, common mistakes, etc.
playlists.launchSession: Start a blind test with this playlist

sessionConfig.title: New blind test
sessionConfig.modeNoAnimatorBody: One player runs the game from their phone. Nobody sees the answers or the upcoming tracks. Best for parties at home, birthdays, hen/stag nights.
sessionConfig.modeAnimatorBody: One person runs the game from the iPad/Mac, sees the answers and adjusts as needed, the others play. Best for bars, events, sessions with a dedicated host.
sessionConfig.nameHint: Helps you find this game in history. Leave empty if you don't need it.
sessionConfig.modeTeamsHint: Players pick a team when they join.

preGame.autoplayBlockedHint: Your browser blocked audio playback. Tap to start.
preGame.safariBannerHint: For the best blind test audio experience, allow media in your site settings (AA icon in the address bar → Website Settings).

host.title: Players are joining…
host.teamEmpty: No players on this team yet.
host.kickConfirm: Kick this player out of the session?
host.contentCrashHint: A render error occurred. Reload the page to resume the game.
host.endBlindTestConfirm: End the blind test? Final podium will show.
host.cancelWaitingConfirm_one: Cancel the session? {{count}} player is already connected and will be disconnected.
host.cancelWaitingConfirm_other: Cancel the session? {{count}} players are already connected and will be disconnected.

noProvider.title: Connect an account before launching
noProvider.body: To play this playlist, you need a Spotify Premium or YouTube account.

preview.title: Session preview
preview.warningLow: Less than half of the tracks are playable. Connect another provider to improve the ratio.

toast.trackUnavailable: Track unavailable with your connected accounts

empty.officialLibrary: The Tutti official library is coming soon 🎵
empty.officialQuizLibrary: The Tutti Quizz library is coming soon 🎯

host.noPlaylistsHint: No published playlists yet. Create one from Tutti Tracks or use 'Express playlist'.
host.expressHint: Create a playlist on the fly for this round, saved for later.
host.expressEmpty: No track yet. Search for an artist or title below.
host.gameLoopComingSoon: Game loop (track playback + buzz) coming in step 10. For now, end the round manually whenever you want.
host.noScoresYet: No score yet — play a round to start the leaderboard.
host.noTrackYet: Waiting for the track to start…
host.syncingHint: Reconnecting to the live session. If it persists, reload the page.
host.spotifyNotConnected: Spotify account not linked to this workspace. Go to Settings → Spotify.
host.spotifyPremiumRequired: Spotify Premium required for full-track playback.
host.demoProviderHint: Demo provider — audio is not auto-played. Launch the track from your own setup.
host.audioBlockedBanner: Sound is blocked by your browser — Click to enable
host.tvHintBody: Open the TV screen to show the QR code in large to players (📺 button top right).

externalScreen.openHint: Open the public view on external screen or new tab
externalScreen.detectedHint: Project the public view on this screen (TV)? Your control interface stays here.
externalScreen.apiUnsupported: Auto-detection not supported by your browser — use the manual button.

host.masterPickHint: Mode B: pick a player as the animator — they'll run the game from their phone (next track, pause, adjust points). The Start button unlocks once an animator is picked.
host.masterPickedHint: {{pseudo}} will run the game from their phone. You can swap animators any time before the game starts.

screen.castSubtitle: Enter the session code to display the game on this TV.
screen.waitingTrackHint: The animator is starting the music from their phone.
screen.listenAndBuzz: Listen and buzz when you recognize it!
screen.joinHint: Scan or type the code at tuttiparty.app/play
screen.endedRematch: Rematch? Scan to start a new game
screen.taglineWaiting: The premium blind test for your parties
screen.phase2OthersHint: Others: buzz fast for degressive points!
screen.waitingAnyPick: The animator will pick the next playlist…
screen.takeABreak: Quick break — grab a drink, more coming.
screen.lobbyWaiting: The animator will start when everyone is ready.
screen.roundPodiumWaiting: The animator is preparing the next round…

play.missingCode: Invalid link. Ask the host to scan the QR code.
play.notFound: Session not found. Check the code.
play.alreadyStarted: This game is already running or finished.
play.kicked: You have been kicked from the game.
play.pseudoTagline: Pick a nickname, it'll appear on the main screen.
play.waitingMessage: Hang tight — the host will start the game soon.
play.endedHint: Thanks for playing — see you next time.
play.waitingTrackHint: The host is about to start it.
play.listenAndBuzz: Listen… buzz when you know it!
play.buzzHint: First to buzz gets to answer.
play.waitForReveal: Waiting for the others… Answer coming up.
play.joinMidGame: 🎵 You're joining mid-game — buzz on the current track!
play.recordingHint: Say the artist (and title for bonus) clearly.
play.masterAdjustHint: Adjustments are silent — no public notification. The score updates discreetly.
play.masterAdjustDeltaHint: Positive (+50) to add, negative (-100) to remove. Between -1000 and +1000.
play.masterEndSessionConfirm: End now? Final podium will show.

onboarding.intro: 3 simple rules to score the most points.
onboarding.step1Body: When you recognize the song, tap the orange buzzer at the bottom of your screen.
onboarding.step2Title: Bring your phone close and say the artist
onboarding.step2Body: Speak the artist's name clearly near the mic. You have 3 seconds.
onboarding.step3Title: Add the title for a BONUS
onboarding.step3Body: Chain it with the title and you score +50 extra points.
onboarding.micConsent: We'll ask for mic access right after.
onboarding.condensedHint: You know the drill. Skipping the recap.
onboarding.micErrorBody: Tutti uses your mic to recognize your voice. Without access, you can't validate your answers.
onboarding.micErrorIos: Settings > Safari > Camera & Mic > tutti.app > Allow. Come back here and tap 'Retry'.
onboarding.micErrorAndroid: Tap the lock icon in the address bar > Permissions > Mic > Allow. Reload if needed.
onboarding.micErrorOther: Look for the mic permissions for tutti.app in your browser's settings, then enable access.

connection.toastMissedRound: You missed round {{round}} — here's the next one.

quizz.title: Tutti Quizz
quizz.comingSoon: Question pack creation and session launch — step 15 of the dev plan.
quizz.description: This section will let you create question packs, configure a bilingual session, and start a game.
quizz.emptyState: No packs yet. Create your first question pack!
quizz.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your pack in a few words…
quizz.deleteConfirm: Delete this pack and all its questions?
quizz.emptyQuestions: — No questions yet. Click "New question" to start. —
quizz.mcqHint: 2 to 6 choices. Leave blank to skip a choice.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.stepPlaylist: Create your first Tutti Tracks playlist
gettingStarted.stepPack: Create your first Tutti Quizz pack

playQuizz.waitingHint: The host is launching the next question.
playQuizz.submittedHint: Waiting for the reveal to see your score.

hostQuizz.noPackError: No question pack is linked to this session.
hostQuizz.readyToStart: Ready to launch the first question?

settings.title: Settings
settings.brandingLogoHint: PNG, JPG, WEBP or SVG. Max 2 MB.
settings.activeProvidersHint: Pick the sources you want to use for searching and adding tracks. You can enable several at once. At least one source must remain checked.
settings.providersAtLeastOne: At least one source must be selected.
settings.membersHint: Share your invitation link to add colleagues to your workspace. They sign up and join automatically.
settings.spotifyDescription: Connect your Spotify account to access the full catalogue and play full tracks (Premium account required for playback).
settings.youtubeDescription: Connect your Google account for enhanced YouTube playback. If you have YouTube Premium, playback is ad-free. Otherwise, Tutti's ad-skip strategy applies (skip 15s intro, stop at 60s).
settings.youtubePremiumHint: Auto-detection via Google API not available. Toggle manually if you have Premium.

admin.upcomingSteps: Next steps in the dev plan: Pop Cocktail design system, Tutti Tracks and Tutti Quizz games…

responsive.tooSmallBody: Come back on a screen at least {{width}} wide.
responsive.tooSmallHint: To play a live session, open /play on your phone — everything is optimized.

pwa.iosHint: On iPhone: tap the Share button ↗, then "Add to Home Screen".
pwa.updateHint: Reload to enjoy the latest improvements.
